title: After a brutal winter, Ukraine’s drones are breaking Russian defenses
summary_full: Russia’s advance has suddenly stalled, and Ukraine is fighting on its own terms — a comeback credited to Kyiv’s efforts to steadily strengthen the capabilities of its UAVs.
summary_public: Russia’s advance has suddenly stalled, and Ukraine is fighting on its own terms — a comeback credited to Kyiv’s efforts to steadily strengthen the capabilities of its UAVs.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Ukraine’s drones are breaking Russian defenses

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine’s drones are breaking Russian defenses
